name: Cucumber & Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into 10 wedges.
2. Peel the cucumber; cut it in half lengthwise and then into thin slices.
3. Cut onion in half lengthwise and slice paper thin.
4. Add onion slices to a bowl and sprinkle with salt, squeezing more salt from your hand over the onions.
5. Rinse the onions under cold water and pat dry thoroughly.
6. On a platter, arrange rows of tomato wedges, cucumber slices, and onion pieces in succession.
7. Sprinkle fresh dill, salt, and chopped chili peppers over the salad.
8. Mix vinegar with oil and lemon dressing until combined.
9. Pour the dressing mixture over the salad, ensuring it is well moistened.
